subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O God! I testify that the light of Thy days hath enveloped Thy servants, and that Thy most sweet voice hath awakened such of Thy creatures
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم اشهد بان نور آیاتک احاط عبادک و ندائک الاحلی ایقظ الراقدین من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
